title: A few suggestions

posts.author: michelle.casanova (Michelle Casanova)
posts.cookedHtml:
Dashboards:

  1. Export widget to a PDF (currently exporting to PDF only takes a snapshot of the whole screen, including all widgets which cuts in the information in them).
  2. Be able to update quarters in FY. Our FY start in October, rather than January
  3. Group boards by folders in Dashboards

Boards/Automation:

  1. Import subitems from Excel
  2. Change a board template and apply changes to all boards that used the template. If this change is made, hoping it works retroactively for all boards created before feature is released.
  3. Automation to create board when a subitem is created
  4. Multi statement automations (with “or”, i.e., If status is Not Started or Late, notify owner"
